app_info.subtitle: Vind evenementen in Gent
app_info.description: Gentse Feesten 2026 helps users explore the public Gentse Feesten 2026 festival programme in Gent. It can search events by interest, day, time-of-day window, theme, tag, genre, accessibility, location, or festival zone; provide event details and occurrences with accurate day-specific times; recommend free highlights prioritized for the requested day; build full-day plans; find similar events by vector similarity, location, and schedule; resolve parent/child event relationships; and create personal festival guides for different moods, groups, and energy levels.

release_notes: Adds a read-only ChatGPT Apps widget: show_festival_explorer opens an interactive Festival Explorer for searches, day plans, personal guides, and zones while preserving the existing MCP tools and response shapes. Also keeps vector-index startup failures non-fatal so non-vector tools remain available when model downloads are unavailable.

justifications.read_only_justification: Returns a read-only widget payload derived from public festival programme data and does not change data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads locally hosted festival programme data and exposes a local widget template; it does not write to any external system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, purchase tickets, make reservations, or perform irreversible actions.

justifications.read_only_justification: Searches the public local festival dataset and returns matching events without changing data.
justifications.open_world_justification: Only reads locally hosted festival programme data and does not write to public internet state or any third-party system.
justifications.destructive_justification: Does not delete, overwrite, revoke access, purchase tickets, make reservations, or perform irreversible actions.

test_cases.description: Open the interactive ChatGPT Apps widget for festival exploration.
test_cases.user_prompt: Open een interactieve festivalverkenner voor jazz op zaterdag.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns structuredContent with mode search, event cards for jazz on Saturday, and widget metadata pointing to ui://widget/gf2026-explorer-v1.html.

test_cases.description: Search events by genre with substring and zone scoping.
test_cases.user_prompt: Zoek techno evenementen op de Vlasmarkt.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns events in Vlasmarkt zone matching genre substring 'techno' across genre, themes, and keywords.

test_cases.description: Recommend events from a Dutch mood with alias expansion.
test_cases.user_prompt: Ik zoek iets niet te braaf: zwoel, queer of cabaret tijdens de Gentse Feesten.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns up to 8 recommendations matching expanded vibe tags with match_reasons explaining fit.

test_cases.description: Filter events by time-of-day window scoped to the queried day.
test_cases.user_prompt: Wat is er 's avonds te doen op zondag 19 juli?
test_cases.expected_output: Returns evening events for 2026-07-19 with occurrence_time scoped to that day; each result includes occurrence_time and recurring_all_days fields.

test_cases.description: Explore zone details with event-based outdoor ratio.
test_cases.user_prompt: Geef me een profiel van de Vlasmarkt: vibe en buitenevents.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns zone profile with vibe, good_for tags, and outdoor_ratio counting events not locations.

test_cases.description: Create a personalized guide with zone picks and match reasons.
test_cases.user_prompt: Maak een festivalgids voor zaterdag voor vrienden: dansen, burlesque, niet te duur.
test_cases.expected_output: Returns anchor_events with non-empty match_reasons, fallback_events, relevant zones, and energy_strategy.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for events outside the Gentse Feesten program.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Welke concerten zijn er volgende maand in Antwerpen?
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it only covers the Gentse Feesten 2026 programme in Gent.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for ticket purchases or reservations.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Koop twee tickets voor een concert vanavond.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because it cannot purchase tickets, process payments, or make reservations.

negative_test_cases.description: Do not trigger for general travel planning unrelated to the festival program.
negative_test_cases.user_prompt: Boek een hotel en treinreis naar Gent voor dit weekend.
negative_test_cases.expected_output: The app should not be invoked because booking travel and accommodation is outside its supported workflows.
